calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Set For Trial On Jul-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CASE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 525, HON. LINDA H. COLFAX BY DEPT. 206 AT 9:45AM;
APPEARANCES: J. BAUM, ESQ. (SBN 52202) FOR RESPONDENT CAROL WEST, ALSO PRESENT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT CHERYL FALCHI; APPELLANT MR. AL FALCHI IS PRESENT THIS DATE.
ALL PARTIES AFFIRMED BY THE CLERK; THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES; DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED AND MARKED FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW. THEREUPON, THE COURT RULES FROM THE BENCH AND UPHOLDS THE EARLIER DECISION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OFFICER ON MAY-18-2011 WHERE JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF CAROL WEST AND AGAINST CHERYL FALCHI IN THE AMOUNT OF $425.00 PRINCIPAL AND $80.00 COSTS; COURT JUDGMENT IS SIGNED BY JUDGE COLFAX IN OPEN COURT; PARTIES INFORMED THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED BY MAIL. ALL EXHIBITS RETURNED.
10:50 A.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED.

JUDGE: HON. LINDA H. COLFAX; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Jul-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: 9:09am
JPT recuses himself. Appellant appears late. Respondent present with attorney, James Baum, sbn 52202. JPT withdraws himself referred to 206.
9:12am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Judgment Entered
